stockOperations.title: Stock operations
stockOperations.subtitle: Stock, receiving, inventory, transfer and corrective movement supervision.

access.title: Restricted access
access.description: Your profile cannot view stock operations.

scope.managerHint: Operations are automatically limited to the manager's assigned shop.

placeholders.reverseReason: Explain why the movement must be reversed

stock.title: Available stock
stock.description: Overall stock levels by article and warehouse.
stock.empty: No stock line in the current shop scope.

supply.title: Supply
supply.description: Add article stock through the existing reception workflow.

alerts.title: Priority alerts
alerts.description: Articles below threshold detected by the server.

reverse.title: Reverse movement
reverse.description: Safely cancel a recent movement when necessary.

receptions.title: Open receptions
receptions.description: Select a reception to scan and validate received items.
receptions.empty: No reception in the current shop scope.
receptions.linesDescription: Scanned quantity details for the selected reception.
receptions.emptyLines: No lines loaded for the current reception.
receptions.validateDescription: Choose the warehouse where stock will be added.

inventories.title: Inventories
inventories.description: Start, count and close current inventories.
inventories.empty: No inventory in the current shop scope.
inventories.linesDescription: Variance between theoretical and counted quantities for the selected inventory.
inventories.scanDescription: Start the inventory, then enter counted quantities.
inventories.closeDescription: Choose whether to apply adjustments generated by recorded variances.

transfers.title: Transfers
transfers.description: Track transfers between shops and warehouses.
transfers.empty: No transfer in the current shop scope.
transfers.linesDescription: Items included in the selected transfer.
transfers.emptyLines: No lines loaded for the current transfer.
transfers.scanDescription: Scan articles from the origin shop before validation.
transfers.validateDescription: Select the source and destination warehouses used by the workflow.

messages.selectReceptionForScan: Select a reception before scanning an item.
messages.selectReceptionAndDepot: Select a reception and a destination warehouse.
messages.receptionValidated: The reception was validated and stock was updated.
messages.supplyMissingFields: Enter the shop, article, quantity and date.
messages.supplyValidated: The supply was validated and stock was updated.
messages.selectInventoryForCount: Select an inventory before entering a count.
messages.selectTransferForScan: Select a transfer before scanning an item.
messages.selectTransferAndDepots: Select the transfer and relevant warehouses.
messages.actionFailed: The requested action could not be completed. Check the entered information and try again.
